name: io.github.japlete/md-vision
title: md-vision
description: Read markdown with inlined images and index headings for agentic RAG workflows.

packageArguments.name: --allow-path
packageArguments.description: Local file or directory root that markdown reads must stay within.

packageArguments.name: --allow-domain
packageArguments.description: Allowed HTTP(S) host for markdown and image URLs. Use "none" to disable URLs or "all" to allow any host.
